hooks.command: if [ "${CLAUDE_TOOL_USE_FILE_PATH##*.}" = "py" ] && command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then ruff check --fix "${CLAUDE_TOOL_USE_FILE_PATH}" 2>/dev/null; ruff format "${CLAUDE_TOOL_USE_FILE_PATH}" 2>/dev/null; fi
case "${CLAUDE_TOOL_USE_FILE_PATH}" in *.pt|*.pth|*.bin) echo "[HOOK] BLOCKED: ${CLAUDE_TOOL_USE_FILE_PATH} is a weight file — do not edit or overwrite"; exit 1;; esac; exit 0
if echo "${CLAUDE_TOOL_USE_COMMAND:-}" | grep -qE '(rm|mv|>).*\.(pt|pth)'; then echo "[HOOK] BLOCKED: command may delete/overwrite .pt weight files"; exit 1; fi; exit 0
